rules.rule_text:
title: ClickFix Command Execution
id: d3b99c23-2d06-41c4-a25b-84b13df6bfd4
status: test
description: Detects a variant of ClickFix where the user is tricked into running
  a malicious command as part of "verfification"
references:
- https://redcanary.com/blog/threat-intelligence/intelligence-insights-september-2025/
author: NTT Security - Andreas Foureaux
date: 2025-10-05
logsource:
  product: windows
  category: process_creation
detection:
  selection_cmd_image:
    Image|endswith: \cmd.exe
    ParentImage|endswith: \explorer.exe
  selection_cmd_command:
  - CommandLine|contains|all:
    - start
    - exit
  condition: all of selection_cmd*
falsepositives:
- Unlikely
level: high
